name: The Terra // RPG
description:
Welcome to Terra!

About Terra:

  • It is year 2120. The world is rather stable, except for the war between the Nexus Empire and Zharun Kingdom.

  • Terra is slightly bigger and colder than Earth. There are no deserts.

  • The southern hemisphere is warmer because it is constantly tilted toward the sun.

  • Terra has four continents:

    • Temir - the hottest continent. Mainly steppes and broadleaf forests.

    • Damir - the biggest continent. The northen part is taiga and mountains.

    • Polaris - the smallest continent around the North Pole. Ice desert and mountains.

    • Nordania - the two thirds of it is behind the Arctic Circle. The sourthen part is half-rundra, the rest is ice desert and mountains.

Countries:

  • Nexus Empire

    • The most powerful state on Terra. A conglomerate with a parliamentary monarchy, an authoritarian regime, and a focus on the military industry.

    • High standard of living, high technology, powerful army.

    • The Empire has a rich, thousand-year-old history.

    • The most feared and the biggest country.

    • Capital: Saintburg

    • Territory: the northen half of Temir, except for the territoty of the east coast, and a southern part of Nordania.

  • Republic of Hyperborea

    • An industrial, peaceful state beyond the Arctic Circle with a republican form of government.

    • Hyperborea has no army at all. Not like it needs it. There is eternal hailstorm, so it is possible to travel only by train or icebreaker.

    • The bulk of GDP is production and exports.

    • The highest living standarts on Terra, despite harsh enviroment.

    • Capital: Borealis

    • Territory: the biggest part of Nordania and whole Polaris.

More states are comming soon!
creator: Monster From-the-wardrobe
